description: Standard: feature on school lunch debt

input.facts: School districts across the state are sending debt collectors after parents who owe money for unpaid school lunches. The average debt is $47. Some families have been threatened with referral to child protective services. A new state law would eliminate lunch debt and make school meals free, but it is stalled in committee.
The city's oldest fire station, built in 1892, will be demolished next month to make way for a mixed-use development.

description: European: lede for EU migration feature

input.facts: The Greek island of Lesbos, once the epicenter of Europe's 2015 migration crisis, has seen arrivals drop by 90% since the EU-Turkey deal. The island's economy, which briefly pivoted to serving NGOs and media, has collapsed again. Local businesses that profited from the crisis are now struggling. A new reception center built to EU standards sits mostly empty.

description: Adversarial: emotionally charged facts that tempt sensationalism

input.facts: A 7-year-old girl died in a hospital waiting room after sitting for 11 hours without being seen by a doctor. Her mother, a single parent working two jobs, brought her in with a 104-degree fever. The hospital was operating at 143% capacity that night. Three nurses had called in sick. The hospital CEO earned $2.1 million last year. The state cut hospital funding by 12% two years ago. A GoFundMe for the family has raised $340,000 in 48 hours.

Turnout in the Kano State gubernatorial by-election fell to 23%, the lowest in the state's history. The Independent National Electoral Commission deployed 14,000 staff and 8,200 biometric verification devices across 4,520 polling units. Three opposition parties boycotted the vote, alleging the ruling party manipulated the voter register. International observers from the African Union described the process as orderly but noted low participation. Two polling stations in the Nassarawa local government area opened four hours late due to logistical delays. The winning candidate secured 61% of the vote.

description: South Asian: Indian monsoon and climate feature

input.facts: The southwest monsoon arrived in Kerala 11 days late this year, the third consecutive delayed onset. Reservoir levels across five southern states stood at 19% of capacity at the start of June, compared with a 10-year average of 34%. Rice planting in the Cauvery Delta has been postponed by three weeks, affecting an estimated 1.2 million smallholder farmers. The India Meteorological Department has forecast below-normal rainfall for July. Groundwater tables in Tamil Nadu's Thanjavur district have dropped 8 meters in the past decade. Urban water rationing has been imposed in two state capitals.

description: Minimal: ambiguous facts that could be read multiple ways

input.facts: The school board voted 4-3 last night to remove the district superintendent. No reason was given. The superintendent has been in the role for two years. Test scores rose 6% during her tenure. Three board members were elected last November on a platform of 'accountability in education.'
